word: H927 - בְּהַל - bᵉhal - be-hal' - In haste

sections.paragraph:
Original: בּהל

Transliteration: behal

Phonetic: be-hal'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Pual) to frighten, alarm, dismay
  2. (Ithpa'al) to hurry, hasten
  3. (Ithpa'al) alarmed (participle)

Origin: corresponding to H926

TWOT entry: 2624

Part(s) of speech: Verb
